title: SearchFields
description:
SearchFields is an array of SearchField objects. The following validations apply:
* If the searchFields array contains both TRANSACTION_AMOUNT and TRANSACTION_CURRENCY_CODE searchParameters, then the value of the "searchFieldCards" and "required" properties must be same for both items
* If the searchFields array contains the TRANSACTION_AMOUNT searchParameter, then it must also contain the TRANSACTION_CURRENCY_CODE searchParameter (and vice versa)
